meeting.track_notes: Turf. 2300m oval circuit. Races up to 1200m straight course; beyond 1200m clockwise round turn INSIDE TRACK with 550m run-in. There are inside and outside tracks in races beyond 1200m with a common back 1800m 1400m OUTSIDE TRACK straight and turns. The outside track joins the 1200m straight course at the 550m mark, while the inside track has its own run-in. DRAW: Low-number draws favoured 1600m. FALSE RAIL: 3m 1600m 1400m
meeting.draw_bias_notes: DRAW: Low-number draws favoured 1600m. FALSE RAIL: 3m 1600m 1400m

races.race_name: LUCKY FISH NEW FORTUNE JUVENILE PLATE
races.race_type: For 2 yo R100 000 Win BSA / RCS Bonus
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: VIBE CHECK was most impressive on his KwaZulu-Natal debut. He has class about him and could pass this next test and then move on to feature events. KAZENOYONI won nicely on debut and the form has worked out well. He too looks promising. RIFF RAFF BOY is proven over the trip and must have a say from gate No 1. ODE TO THE SEA can earn if running to his best over the extra. SCOTT’S BAR and stablemate SPLIT THE GEE are both well-bred sons of Malmoos, follow the betting moves closely.

races.race_name: RACE COAST - BRIGHT FUTURE FOR SA HORSE RACING MAIDEN JUVENILE PLATE
races.race_type: For 2 yo R100 000 Win BSA / RCS Bonus
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: SCOTS WAE HAE made a fine debut and with improvement can win this. Stablemate GIMME A FIREBALL is bred to be quick and could attract support. STRONGER TOGETHER has run two good races and should be right there from gate No 1. TIGER CODY finished ahead of him but followed up with a below-par run. He can improve. THUNDER STAR ran well on debut before facing an exceptional horse in a Grade 3. He should run a better race this time. SO INDI made a fair debut and has a chance with improvement.

races.race_name: BET WITH TOTE MAIDEN PLATE (F & M)
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: RAGS TO RICHES made a good debut over the course and distance. She is open to improvement but has drawn towards the outside of the track. WATER HYACINTH has been knocking on the door and has a lot of course experience. She should prefer the extra and has drawn well. COME TOGETHER ran a fair race on local debut on the Polytrack and could repeat the run at Hollywoodbets Scottsville first time. CALIFORNIA DREAMER wasn’t disgraced on debut and with improvement can earn. ASGARDIAN QUEEN has honest form and must have a say.

races.race_name: TOTE FOR THE WIN MAIDEN PLATE
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: OCTOBER RUSH is a well-bred Rafeef colt who won’t need to be special to open his account on the first time of asking. He races for the powerful Dean Kannemeyer yard. PRITTI UNITED caught the eye with a strong finish in his last start. If in the same mood on local debut he could reward his connections with a win. LIGHT THE FIRE has run well over different distances but could just prefer returning to a sprint. QUICKSMART has run well since arriving from the Cape but is taking quite a drop in distance.

races.race_name: ONLINE FORM GUIDE www.gallop.co.za A STAKES
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: Champion racehorse DAVE THE KING is two from two at this track. He enjoys ‘prepping’ at this course and could be hard to beat again. ARISTOCRATIC could still be on the up and in his third run as a gelding can give cheek. This 1400m looks ideal. IMPOSING has won seven times over the distance. His last two runs after a break are fair efforts and he could be a big threat this time. Classy stayer KING PELLES could find it short but must be watched. ICY BLAST and ZEITZ have earning potential.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET

races.race_name: IN THE BOX SEAT PODCAST BROUGHT TO YOU BY GALLOP TV B STAKES
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: GREEN GLOW looked the likely winner last time when beaten in a close finish. It was his first run back from a break and he should improve. OFFICER IN COMMAND showed form when going over further in his last start. With his confidence boosted he can go close at his best track. DOWN BY THE RIVER met some of the best around last time. He must not be ignored. CAPSAICIN has run well at this track and could be well placed. KANAAL SKATER has a chance if finding his best form. THE SHEPHERD has his third run after a rest and has the ability to go well.

races.race_name: BET WITH COLOSSUS POOLS EXCLUSIVE ON www.tote.co.za CLASS 4 (F & M)
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: TAYLOR’S VERSION won her first two starts at this track with authority and can make it a hat-trick, but she is up against stronger this time. RED TAFFETY won impressively last time and has a chance of scoring a three timer too. She will need to prove herself at the track first time. SILVER SALUTE is also making her track debut. She went close last time after winning her KZN debut and could turn the form around with RED TAFFETY at the weights. MISS TWINKLE and BLUE POPPY have both run some decent races and must be included. PRETTY KARA needs to step up on her latest effort.

races.race_name: LUCKY FISH TURF LUCK CLASS 3 (F & M)
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: FIERY ROSE has looked promising on the Highveld and has a chance in this line up. She goes 1200m and is making her Hollywoodbets Scottsville debut. TLADI MOTHWANA was outgunned last time in a Grade 3 but can go close back in this level of company. She is one from one at this track. TULIP FIELDS has a win and a good second in a Grade 3 at this course and should go close. QUERARI ROSE is capable of placing if producing her best. There should not be much to choose between ONE SMART COOKIE and TARA STAR. Both are useful sorts and can be dangerous.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: SUMMER WINTER has the form to be a big contender in this field. YOUR LADYSHIP made some improvement last time. If not minding the drop in trip she could take advantage with a light weight. CALL OF THE KAROO improved last time and can build on the performance. ARVERNI PRINCESS is speedy and even though having drawn widest could still be right there at the business end. CELESTIAL DIAMOND was knocking on the door before a rest and can get away with it over this trip.
